name: Mediterranean Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced tomatoes in a large serving dish.
2. Peel the cucumber, halve it lengthwise, remove the seeds, and slice thinly. Add these slices to the tomatoes.
3. Add the remaining salad ingredients (scallions, celery, mint, parsley, and garlic) to the dish with the tomatoes and mix gently.
4. To make the dressing, whisk together 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 tbsp lemon juice, 3/4 tsp salt, and black pepper to taste in a small bowl.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently before refrigerating until ready to serve.
